description: Use this API to purge GIC branch data from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0. ierr = gic_brn_purg(ibus,jbus,ckt)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus number of the branch as in the working case. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus number of the branch as in the working case. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
